ipos.summary: The flagship financial-services arm of the Tata Group, mandated to list under RBI's upper-layer NBFC norms. One of the most anticipated IPOs of 2026.

overview.introduction: Tata Capital is a diversified NBFC offering retail, SME and corporate lending, wealth and investment products, part of the Tata Group.
overview.businessModel: Earns a net interest margin across a broad lending portfolio, leveraging the Tata brand, diversified products and a pan-India distribution footprint.
overview.industryAnalysis: RBI's scale-based regulation is pushing large NBFCs to list; India's credit demand offers a long growth runway.

news.title: Tata Capital files updated DRHP for mega IPO
Pre-IPO grey market premium firms up

ipos.summary: Long-awaited public debut of India's largest telecom and digital-services operator. Expected to be among the biggest IPOs in Indian history.

overview.introduction: Jio Platforms is India's largest telecommunications and digital-services company, spanning mobile connectivity, broadband and a suite of consumer apps.
overview.businessModel: Generates ARPU-driven subscription revenue across mobile and home broadband, with upside from digital services, enterprise and AI initiatives.
overview.industryAnalysis: India's data consumption and 5G adoption continue to rise, while digital-services monetisation is an emerging lever.

news.title: Reliance signals Jio listing timeline at AGM

ipos.summary: Quick-commerce challenger eyeing a public listing after rapid GMV growth. A high-profile, high-growth, still-loss-making consumer-internet IPO.

overview.introduction: Zepto operates a quick-commerce platform delivering groceries and daily essentials in minutes via a network of dark stores.
overview.businessModel: Earns take-rate and advertising revenue on rapid-delivery orders, scaling dark-store density to improve unit economics.
overview.industryAnalysis: Indian quick-commerce is growing explosively but remains intensely competitive and cash-burning.

news.title: Zepto raises pre-IPO round, eyes profitability
